examples: Compensation incentive plays nondeductible role in the incentive system of a enterprise.
It may be advisable to take out a home-equity loan to pay off other nondeductible obligations.
Tax authorities can set a nondeductible portion for input tax which cannot then be claimed from the tax authorities.
Running for president is legally considered a personal expense, nondeductible under the income tax.
The IRS claimed the payment was nondeductible whether the payment itself was legal or not.
